Product Vision: Multi-tenant Restaurant Financial Intelligence Platform
nodes.rationale: Platform intended to be a complete restaurant financial operating system

nodes.label: Toast POS Integration
nodes.rationale: Toast is the primary sales source

nodes.label: Google Ads Integration
nodes.rationale: Marketing spend must flow into P&L automatically

nodes.label: Reconciliation Engine
nodes.rationale: All reconciliation actions must be auditable

nodes.label: P&L Engine
nodes.rationale: Generates Gross Revenue, Net Revenue, COGS, Labor Cost, Prime Cost, Gross Profit, EBITDA, Net Profit

nodes.label: Multi-Tenancy Requirements
nodes.rationale: Every table must contain tenant_id; cross-tenant data exposure is a critical defect

nodes.label: Financial Data Rules (Decimal, NUMERIC 15,2)
nodes.rationale: Never use floating point for money
